title: Quite a problem
description: It gets tiring, looking for all ways in which the word ‘problem’ can be used (and mis-used) in the news media. And yet, that’s been your job for several years: looking through news stories for that word. Wouldn’t it be better if you could automate the process?
inputDesc: Each line of input is one test case. Lines are at most 80 characters long. There are at most 1000 lines of input. Input ends at end of file.
outputDesc: For each line of input, print yes if the line contains ‘problem’, and no otherwise. Any capitalization of ‘problem’ counts as an occurrence.
